introspect.description: Daily self-reflection - reviews sessions, writes journal entry to Obsidian

morning_brief.description: Daily morning brief - weather, news, threads, queued for next app launch

evolve.description: Monthly self-evolution - revises soul.md and system.md from journal reflections

heartbeat.description: Periodic check-in evaluation - decides whether to reach out unprompted

sleep_cycle.description: Nightly memory reconciliation - processes day's sessions, extracts facts, updates threads

observer.description: Periodic fact extraction from recent conversation

check_reminders.description: Check and fire due reminders - runs every minute
